headline: OXY Outperforms Industry in Past Month: Buy, Hold or Sell the Stock?
summary: Occidental Petroleum jumps 26.8% in a month, beating its industry as rising oil prices, Permian strength and debt reduction support the outlook.

headline: SM Energy Is Up 37% and Reddit Is Still Calling It Undervalued
summary: A prominent independent energy company based in Denver, Colorado, SM Energy (NYSE:SM) has climbed 37% year-to-date as retail investors weigh whether its $12.8 billion merger with Civitas Resources, which was successfully closed on January 30, 2026, is a genuine scale play or a leverage trap. Reddit sentiment sits at 78 to 84 out of 100, ... SM Energy Is Up 37% and Reddit Is Still Calling It Undervalued

headline: Jim Cramer on Devon Energy: “Great Natural Gas Portfolio”
summary: Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer answered questions about. A caller mentioned that the stock looks undervalued due to the upcoming merger, and asked if they should sell, take a “schnitzel” approach, or hold the stock. Cramer replied: I agree with you. Great natural gas portfolio. It’s not necessarily going […]

headline: With $100 Oil Expected, The S&P 500 Turns Positive Pre-Market | GSPC
summary: S&P 500 futures are pointing +0.37% higher ahead of Friday’s open, a modest recovery attempt after the index shed 1.52% on Thursday flirts with $100 a barrel pricing. The session’s tentative optimism rests on a complicated foundation: energy prices that are surging toward levels not seen since 2022, geopolitical disruption in the Strait of Hormuz, ... With $100 Oil Expected, The S&P 500 Turns Positive Pre-Market | GSPC
